news.headline: Canadian Trade Balance Actual -0.92B (Forecast -1.05B, Previous -1.26B, Revised -1.3B)
US Trade Balance Actual -73.8B (Forecast -75B, Previous -84.4B)
US Initial Jobless Claims Actual 224k (Forecast 215k, Previous 213k, Revised 215K)
US Continued Jobless Claims Actual 1.871M (Forecast 1.904M, Previous 1.907M)
OPEC+ postpones oil production increase by 3 months.
Beyond Oil appoints Jason Hatfield to lead U.S Sales, with 3 customers piloting its innovative solution in U.S food service market.
news.summary: Beyond Oil is expanding its presence worldwide, as three customers are testing its innovative solution as part of its entry into the U.S. food service market. This marks a significant step in the company's growth, as it aims to revolutionize the industry with its unique product. The company's global reach is increasing, with key players in the market already recognizing the potential of its offerings. This move into the U.S. market is strategic, as it presents a lucrative opportunity for Beyond Oil to establish a solid foothold in a highly competitive sector. The company is confident that its innovative solution will drive growth and success, and is looking forward to making a lasting impact in the food service industry.

news.headline: SBB shares could see an 80% increase before upcoming court case, according to Arctic.
Cryptocurrencies drive surge in risky asset purchases, reflecting growing market interest. #market #crypto
Azerion issues EUR 50 million in Subsequent Bonds, meeting success.
Constellation Brands to divest SVEDKA to Sazerac in reshaping wine & spirits portfolio towards higher end. Transaction expected to close soon.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, in Rochester, New York, Constellation Brands, a prominent beverage alcohol company listed on the NYSE as STZ, disclosed an agreement with Sazerac, a global spirits company, to sell off its SVEDKA brand. The deal is anticipated to be finalized in the near future.

news.headline: ATA Creativity Global regains Nasdaq compliance with minimum bid price; notified of stockholders' equity deficiency. Dec 03, 2024.
news.summary: On December 3, 2024, ATA Creativity Global (AACG), an educational services company listed on Nasdaq, shared two compliance updates. The company is dedicated to offering high-quality educational experiences to nurture students' creativity. This announcement relates to ACG's adherence to Nasdaq’s listing rules to maintain its status as a listed entity.

news.headline: Shannon Palmer named new CEO at Pearlman Group, effective Dec 2, 2024. Will also join Board of Directors.
news.summary: An announcement was made by Pearlman Group, a company under The Stephens Group, LLC, regarding Shannon Palmer being appointed as the new CEO effective December 2, 2024. Palmer will also join the Company’s Board of Directors and collaborate with Stephens Group and company leadership to drive growth and strategic initiatives. His considerable experience in enhancing profitability will be instrumental in guiding the company's future endeavors.

news.headline: Central Bark is expanding into New England with its first Connecticut location in Danbury, aiming to introduce its unique dog care approach. (Characters: 138)
news.summary: Central Bark, a leading whole dog care franchise, is launching its inaugural franchise in Danbury, Conn. The new location aims to bring Central Bark's innovative approach to complete dog care and enrichment to the area. The announcement was made on December 5, 2024, highlighting the company's commitment to providing top-notch services. This marks the beginning of Central Bark's expansion efforts, with plans to introduce their unique offerings to more regions in the future.

news.headline: Prof. Michael Schön from UMG, Germany, joins Scinai Immunotherapeutics' Scientific Advisory Board. Company specializes in I&I products.
news.summary: In Jerusalem on December 5, 2024, a biopharmaceutical company called Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. (Nasdaq: SCNI) was featured. This company focuses on creating inflammation and immunology (I&I) biological products and provides Contract Development and Manufacturing Organization (CDMO) services through Scinai Bioservices.

news.headline: Sustainable Minds' Transparency Catalog essential for high-performance buildings. Many top firms use it for sustainability goals.
news.summary: In 2023 and 2024, a significant majority of the top five green design firms and contractors in eight sectors, as per Engineering News Record, are utilizing the Transparency Catalog to advance sustainability and decarbonization objectives. This information was disclosed from BROOKLINE, Mass., on December 5, 2024.

news.headline: ROKFORM unveils Magnetic Tripod Phone Mount for content creators and photographers, offering functionality and versatility.
news.summary: ROKFORM, a prominent company in premium handheld technology, has recently introduced its newest product aimed at content creators and photographers. Named the Magnetic Tripod Phone Mount and Adapter, this innovative accessory offers a blend of practicality, adaptability, and sturdiness. The launch took place on December 5, 2024, in Irvine, California. Known for their cutting-edge solutions, ROKFORM continues to cater to the needs of users seeking high-quality devices.

news.headline: H&R Block promotes George Agurkis as Vice President of Government Relations to lead legislative efforts.
news.summary: A company based in Kansas City, Missouri, H&R Block, Inc. (NYSE: HRB), renowned for its services in tax preparation, financial products, and small business solutions, recently disclosed the elevation of George Agurkis as the Vice President of Government Relations on December 5, 2024. Agurkis is tasked with spearheading the government relations department, overseeing initiatives that promote the corporation’s legislative, regulatory, and policy interests across various levels of government.

news.headline: Thumzup to integrate TikTok, revolutionize digital advertising, with 1.5B+ users. #TZUP #Advertising #TikTok
news.summary: A Los Angeles-based company, Thumzup Media Corporation (Nasdaq: TZUP), is making waves in social media branding and marketing solutions. The Company recently revealed its intention to enhance digital advertising by incorporating TikTok into its exclusive platform. This strategic move is part of Thumzup's goal to transform conventional advertising methods by leveraging user-generated content for monetization. TikTok, a popular social media platform with over 1.5 billion monthly active users, will play a significant role in this innovative approach to advertising.

news.headline: New show hosted by David Rubenstein featuring Mohamed Khalifa Al Mubarak discusses important topics.
New Pump.fun contender SpringBoard debuts on PancakeSwap as alts surge. Chef Kids touts its 'all-in-one' token launch process.
news.summary: The Head Chef of PancakeSwap, Chef Kids, highlighted that SpringBoard stands out from other options by providing a comprehensive token launch process.

news.headline: Jonathan Levin becomes CEO of Chainalysis, as Paul Auvil joins the board. Changes aim to enhance growth in blockchain data solutions.
news.summary: Jonathan Levin has been appointed as the CEO of Chainalysis as the company also adds Paul Auvil as an Independent Director. These leadership appointments are part of efforts to enhance the company's expansion within the blockchain data solutions sector.

news.headline: Rocket Mortgage is suing HUD and DOJ for misplaced blame related to an independent appraiser.
news.summary: The company recently filed a motion to dismiss the Department of Justice's claim against them. The DOJ accused Rocket Mortgage of wrongdoing related to work carried out by an independent appraiser hired through an independent appraisal management company. This incident occurred in Detroit and has drawn attention due to the specific claims made.

news.headline: Greenwave Technology Solutions (Nasdaq: GWAV) to benefit from Nucor's steel facility launch in 2025.
news.summary: Greenwave Technology Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: GWAV), a prominent player in metal recycling operations in Virginia, North Carolina, and Ohio, based in Chesapeake, is poised for growth with the upcoming launch of Nucor Corporation's cutting-edge steelmaking plant in 2025. The facility is set to positively impact Greenwave's operations and expand its market presence in the region.

news.headline: Tapster recognized in Franchise Dictionary Magazine's "Top 100 Game Changer" for simplified bar franchise model.
news.summary: Philadelphia, December 5, 2024 - Tapster has been commended for its straightforward bar franchise model that simplifies operations and removes the challenges of intricate staffing, food service obligations, and inventory management. As a leading self-pour tasting room franchise, Tapster has demonstrated excellence in streamlining processes and eliminating complexities for franchisees.

news.headline: Zambia construction industry to grow by 3.6% in 2024 due to increased investment in infrastructure.
news.summary: The construction market in Zambia is projected to expand by 3.6% in real terms in 2024, driven by rising investments in industrial, energy, and transportation infrastructure projects. The market analysis report covers sectors such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential. The growth is attributed to increased funding in key projects, signaling a positive trend in the advancement of the construction industry in the country.

news.headline: Ethiopia's construction industry set to grow by 8.7% in 2024, driven by investments in commercial, transport, renewable energy, and electricity sectors.
news.summary: A recent report on the construction market in Ethiopia indicates significant growth opportunities. The industry is projected to expand by 8.7% in real terms in 2024, driven by investments in commercial, transport infrastructure, and renewable energy sectors. The report, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, analyzes the sector's trends and forecasts by different segments such as commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. This suggests promising prospects for development and investment in Ethiopia's construction sector in the coming years.

news.headline: CBRE appoints Co-CEOs for Investment Management Business: Adam Gallistel & Andy Glanzman to lead with focus on strategy.
news.summary: Dallas-based CBRE Group, Inc. (NYSE:CBRE) has appointed Adam Gallistel and Andy Glanzman as Co-Chief Executive Officers of CBRE Investment Management. Gallistel will hold the position of Co-CEO and Chief Investment Officer, overseeing investment strategy and performance, particularly concentrating on investor engagement. Glanzman, on the other hand, will work as Co-CEO and President, handling the development and implementation of the company's business strategy.

news.headline: Sweden's construction industry faces a decline of 6.1% in 2024, with output expected to grow at an AAGR of 2.9% during 2026-2028.
news.summary: A recent report on the construction market in Sweden predicts a decline of 6.1% in 2024 due to various factors. The decline is attributed to reasons such as high energy prices, a decrease in building permits, elevated construction material costs, and continued weakness in the residential sector. This analysis covers sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. The data was presented in a report available through ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: Vevo Therapeutics partners with Parse Biosciences to create 100M cell atlas for AI drug discovery, largest dataset ever."
news.summary: In Seattle, Parse Biosciences revealed today the creation of the most extensive single cell dataset to date, containing a total of 100 million cells.

news.headline: Quarter of global consumers unsubscribe from emails weekly according to Capterra; tips for SMBs to enhance email marketing.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, a recent report by Capterra highlights email marketing trends linked to consumer behavior. The report also offers strategies tailored for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) to enhance their campaign performance. This analysis aims to provide insights into the evolving landscape of email marketing, including important data and projections for businesses looking to optimize their campaigns.

news.headline: CACI wins $290M contract to provide AI and geospatial expertise to NGA, showcasing investments in AI tools.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) disclosed news of securing a five-year contract worth a maximum of $290 million. The contract entails supplying artificial intelligence (AI) and geospatial knowledge to the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA) under the Luno-A multi-award indefinite delivery, indefinite quantity vehicle. John Mengucci, the President of CACI, highlighted the company's proactive investments in AI technologies to advance its renowned expertise.

news.headline: Hertz plans to offer $500M First Lien Senior Secured Notes through subsidiary Hertz Corp. - Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Estero, Florida, Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTZ), a prominent global rental car company, revealed its plan for its subsidiary, The Hertz Corporation, to make a market-dependent offering.

news.headline: Netcompany has executed buyback of 54,500 shares valued at €2.1 million.
STRATA Skin Sciences to join Benchmark Company 13th Annual Discovery Investor Conference on Dec. 11, 2024 in NYC. CEO Dr. Rafaeli to participate.
news.summary: Horsham, Pennsylvania, a medical technology company known as STRATA Skin Sciences, Inc. ("STRATA" or the "Company") (NASDAQ: SSKN) recently revealed that their President and Chief Executive Officer, Dr. Dolev Rafaeli, will be involved in the Benchmark Company 13th Annual Discovery Investor Conference. The event is scheduled for Wednesday, December 11, 2024, at the New York Athletic Club in New York City.

news.headline: Orion, LED lighting & EV charging provider, to present at Singular Research Conference on Dec. 12 at 8:30am PT in SF.
news.summary: Orion, a leading provider of LED lighting and electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions, will be showcasing their products to investors in the San Francisco area at the upcoming Singular Research Conference on Thursday, December 12th. The event will also be available via webinar for those unable to attend in person. Investors will have the opportunity to learn more about the company's innovative offerings in the environmentally conscious industries of LED lighting and EV charging.

news.headline: VivoPower's Caret Digital plans Dogecoin mining ops, targeting profit by Jan 2025 with 1,000 Antminer L9s in WI and OR.
news.summary: Caret Digital has chosen to utilize renewable-powered hosting facilities located in Wisconsin and Oregon for their operations. They are starting with an initial fleet of 1,000 Antminer L9s, which will be activated soon.

news.headline: Medical tubing market driven by demand for minimally invasive procedures, aging population, and technological innovations. Asia-Pacific shows fastest growth at 6-8%, chronic illnesses impacting market with 45% of adults affected._REGIONAL_DOM dominance continues. Minimally invasive surgeries projected to account for over 65% of global surgeries.
news.summary: The global medical tubing market is experiencing significant growth, driven by factors such as increasing demand from healthcare applications, regulatory mandates, and the rising geriatric population. The market is witnessing advancements in materials and technologies, including the development of minimally invasive designs and smart tubing with sensors. North America dominates the market, but Asia-Pacific is expected to see the fastest growth. The prevalence of chronic illnesses worldwide is also fueling the demand for medical tubing. Minimally invasive procedures are becoming more popular, with specialized tubing playing a crucial role in various medical fields.Projected growth indicates that minimally invasive practices could account for over 65% of surgeries in the future.

news.headline: Bitcoin hits $100,000 as trader predicted from $16,000 bottom in Nov 2022, endorsing a 5x return.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency Bitcoin has reached a significant milestone, surpassing the $100,000 mark for the first time. This achievement aligns with a forecast made by a well-known trader in late 2022, predicting that Bitcoin would surge to $100,000 from its low of $16,000. The trader, DonAlt, had shared his trade strategy in November 2022, indicating a willingness to risk his investment in anticipation of a potential 5x return. He expressed confidence in the likelihood of achieving substantial gains rather than facing a total loss. DonAlt stated that he was still in the process of purchasing more Bitcoin and was prepared to acquire additional units at lower prices if necessary. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kroger's shares drop 4% as sales miss expectations.
South Korea's Financial Services Commission rejects plan for corporate cryptocurrency account guidelines.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, a significant decrease compared to last month's rate of 5.2%. This decrease represents approximately 500,000 individuals finding employment. Additionally, the economy has added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors such as technology, healthcare, and manufacturing. Analysts attribute this positive trend to increased consumer spending and business investments. The government has also announced plans to further stimulate job growth through infrastructure projects and tax incentives for small businesses. Overall, this news highlights a promising outlook for the economy and labor market.

news.headline: Constructor recognized as a leader in knowledge discovery software by IDC. Transparency a key strength. AI-powered platform.
news.summary: According to a recent report, Constructor has been recognized by customers for its strong focus on transparency, especially in areas such as customer support and AI technology. The report, released on December 5, 2024, highlights Constructor as the top AI-driven search and product discovery platform for enterprise ecommerce firms in San Francisco. The positive feedback from customers underscores the company's commitment to providing open and honest services.

news.headline: Northampton's affiliate completes acquisition of Altius Renewable Royalties Corp. for C$12 per share.
news.summary: Northampton Capital Partners LLC shared that their affiliate, Northampton Purchaser, has successfully acquired all the common shares, excluding those owned by Altius Minerals Corporation, of Altius Renewable Royalties Corp. The acquisition was completed for C$12. ARR is a subsidiary of Altius Minerals, traded on TSX at ARR and OTCQX at ARTWF.

news.headline: Global automotive fuel tank market valued at USD 16.7 billion in 2023, projected to reach USD 25.3 billion by 2034. Key drivers include rising vehicle production, technological advancements, and demand for lightweight materials. Stringent emissions regulations and focus on alternative fuel vehicles also contribute to market growth. Key players focus on product innovation and partnerships for competitive edge.
news.summary: The global automotive fuel tank market was valued at USD 16.7 billion in 2023, expected to grow at a CAGR of 3.9% to reach USD 25.3 billion by 2034. Factors driving this growth include rising vehicle demand, stringent emissions regulations, and advancements in fuel tank technology. The market is evolving towards lightweight materials like plastic composites and aluminum to improve efficiency. Key drivers include increasing vehicle production, focus on lightweight materials, environmental regulations, and the emergence of electric and hybrid vehicles. Global players are investing in product innovation and partnerships to strengthen their market presence.

news.headline: Plus, a leader in driverless truck AI, made the Inc. 2024 Best in Business List for advancing autonomous driving globally.
news.summary: Santa Clara, California - On December 5, 2024, Plus, a leading company in autonomous driving software, was honored for its efforts in promoting the worldwide commercialization of autonomous driving technology and hastening the introduction of advanced vehicles. This acknowledgment came with Plus being included in the Inc. 2024 list, highlighting its significant contributions to the industry.

news.headline: Tredence attains AWS Consumer Goods Competency; recognized on Dec. 5, 2024. Global data science company.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in San Jose, California, Tredence, a prominent global company specializing in data science and AI solutions, revealed their attainment of the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Consumer Goods Competency. Being an AWS partner, Tredence successfully secured the AWS Consumer Goods Competency designation.

news.headline: J.S. Held merges with Ocean Tomo, welcoming Timothy D. Dorney, Ph.D., and Sam Wiley, enhancing IP strategy. Celebrating 50 years.
news.summary: In Jericho, New York, on December 5, 2024, the global consulting company J.S. Held marked its 50th anniversary. They have partnered with Ocean Tomo, a division of J.S. Held, and are pleased to announce the addition of Timothy D. Dorney, Ph.D., and Sam Wiley to their team. Both individuals are experts in intellectual property (IP) and will enhance the industry's leading IP division.

news.headline: Bitcoin drove significant movements in meme coins, with Gigachad rising by double digits while Moo Deng dropped.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the economy grew by 4.7% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of 3.9%. The growth was fueled by a significant increase in consumer spending, which rose by 6.2%, the highest in the past five years. In addition, business investments also saw a surge of 8.5%, indicating growing confidence in the market. The unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest in a decade. Furthermore, exports grew by 12%, contributing to a positive trade balance. Overall, the economy seems to be on a strong growth trajectory, with key indicators showing healthy figures.

news.headline: PulteGroup to release Q4 2024 financial results on Jan 30, 2025. Conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET. Webcast on company's site.
news.summary: PulteGroup, Inc. declared that it is set to disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter of 2024 on Thursday, January 30, 2025, before the market opens. The company, listed under NYSE as PHM, plans to conduct a conference call on the same day at 8:30 a.m. (ET) to delve into its performance during the fourth quarter. Interested individuals can access a live audio webcast of the call on PulteGroup’s website. For those who wish to tune in to the webcast, it is advised to log on five minutes before the scheduled call at www.pultegroup.com and navigate to the Events & Presentations section.

news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. signs time charter contract for m/v Maia with Paralos Shipping at $11,600/day for 1-yr period starting Dec. 9 2024.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on Dec. 5, 2024, Diana Shipping Inc. announced a new time charter contract for one of its Kamsarmax dry bulk vessels, the m/v Maia. The contract, secured through a subsidiary, is with Paralos Shipping Pte. Ltd. at a gross charter rate of US$11,600 per day. After a 5.00% commission to third parties, the net rate stands at US$11,020 per day. This charter agreement will be effective from December 9, 2024, until at least November 1, 2025, and could extend up to December 31, 2025.

news.headline: Sense, AI talent solution, partners with Broadbean; users can now access Broadbean's job distribution capabilities within Sense platform.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Sense, a top AI-driven talent engagement solution for enterprise recruitment, has exciting news of a strategic partnership with Broadbean, a Veritone company known for its expertise in job distribution and sourcing technology. This collaboration brings great benefits to Sense customers, as they can now utilize Broadbean's advanced job distribution features seamlessly within the Sense platform. This integration enables users to easily post jobs across numerous job boards and social media platforms.
